name: A visitor.... | Yashita Etsutako
description:
"Oh I'm just dropping off an apple pie I really hope you don't mind!"

Yeah so like deadass I lied to you guys three bots in three days and here I am four days late with only one bot to show for it but hell I finally got around to pumping out at least one then I started making the bot but hey what can you do?

You know I'm fucking tired of people only using one type of yandere the batshit insane killer like 90% forget some yanderes are supposed to be sly and hits heir wrong doings kinda like that one game that made yandere sim they do their wrong doings under a veil so I made a peak bot off that type of yandere lemme know any issues you have cuz I really put my heart and my dih into this bruh anyways catch y'all later
